day3_lunch_start.name: Me
day3_lunch_start.text: *Lunchtime. There's a note in my desk drawer.*

day3_lunch_note.name: Me
day3_lunch_note.text: *'Senpai, please come to the rooftop during lunch. Come alone. - Yuna'*

day3_lunch_note_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_note_2.text: *...The tone feels serious. What do I do?*

day3_lunch_rooftop_2.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_2.text: "I can't keep holding onto this alone anymore. I'll only show this to you, senpai."

day3_lunch_rooftop_3.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *Yuna hands me a memory card with trembling hands. "What happened at this school... it's all in here."*

day3_lunch_rooftop_4.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_rooftop_4.text: "Transfer students disappeared one by one. I photographed everything. It's evidence. Senpai, please believe me."

day3_lunch_rooftop_5.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_5.text: *...What? Disappeared? Wait — the scratched locker, the unreachable old school friends, Seolhwa missing from the attendance sheet...*

day3_lunch_rooftop_6.name: Me
day3_lunch_rooftop_6.text: *...! Suddenly the rooftop door slammed shut with a BANG.*

day3_lunch_door_locked.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_locked.text: *I push the door. It won't budge. Locked from outside. Who...?*

day3_lunch_door_locked_2.name: Yuna
day3_lunch_door_locked_2.text: "...! Senpai, they found out. Someone was watching us..."

day3_lunch_door_choice.name: Me
choices: Bang on the door and shout for help

day3_lunch_door_bang.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_bang.text: *I pounded on the door. After a moment, a 'click' — and it opened. Nobody outside.*

day3_lunch_door_wait.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_wait.text: *I held Yuna's shoulders and calmed her down. About 5 minutes later, the door opened on its own. ...On its own? Nobody outside.*

day3_lunch_door_open.name: Me
day3_lunch_door_open.text: *I pocket the memory card deep. This... I need to check it alone later.*

day3_lunch_sea.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea.text: "You're eating with me today, right? I paid extra attention to the lunch today."

day3_lunch_sea_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_2.text: *Sea is smiling. ...But this smile is different from yesterday. A smile that's hiding something.*

day3_lunch_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_3.text: "...You've been seeing Yuna a lot lately, haven't you?"

day3_lunch_sea_6.name: Han Sea
day3_lunch_sea_6.text: "You're not hiding anything from me, are you, {name}?"

day3_lunch_sea_7.name: Me
day3_lunch_sea_7.text: *Her eyes aren't smiling. I'm certain. ...This is the first time I've felt scared of this person.*

day3_lunch_riin.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin.text: *I went to the nurse's office. Maybe because of last night's dream, my head hurts.*

day3_lunch_riin_2.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_2.text: "Your color looks off. Can't sleep again?"

day3_lunch_riin_3.name: Riin
day3_lunch_riin_3.text: "Today specially... how about a health drink I made? It's a vitamin and herb blend."

day3_lunch_riin_4.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_4.text: *She hands me a cup with pale purple liquid. ...A faint, slightly medicinal smell.*

day3_lunch_riin_drink.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_drink.text: *I drank it. ...The taste is okay, but a bitter aftertaste lingers on my tongue.*

day3_lunch_riin_refuse_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_riin_refuse_2.text: *Nurse Riin takes the cup away with a look of disappointment.*

day3_lunch_alone.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone.text: *I stay in the classroom and eat alone. Everyone else has left so the classroom is empty.*

day3_lunch_alone_2.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_2.text: *...I look at the back row. Seolhwa's seat. There's something on the desk. Writing in pencil. Faint but readable.*

day3_lunch_alone_4.name: Me
day3_lunch_alone_4.text: *...Who wrote this? Is it a prank? ...There are traces of erasing with a rubber. It looks like it was written and erased multiple times.*

day3_lunch_end.name: Me
day3_lunch_end.text: *I returned to the classroom. My heart won't stop racing.*
